title: Quiz on Savings Rate
resultSuccessSubheader: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} correct! You're mastering savings rate calculations!
resultSuccessLesson: Lesson: Understanding savings rates helps you plan for your financial future!
resultTryAgainSubheader: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} correct. Practice makes perfect with savings rate calculations!
resultTryAgainTip: Tip: Remember to calculate percentages and understand the importance of consistent saving rates!

questions.text: If you earn ₹1000 and save ₹200, what percentage are you saving?
If you want to save 15% of ₹2000, how much should you save?
What percentage is saved if you earn ₹5000 and spend ₹4000?
If your savings rate is 25% and you save ₹500, how much do you earn?
Which savings rate is the most sustainable for long-term financial health?
